Amended DEMURRER to COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-23-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ALTA LAGUNA, LLC'S Amended DEMURRER to COMPLAINT.

Defendant Alta Laguna, LLC's amended demurrer to Plaintiffs Poornima Ramarao and Ramamurthy Balaji's complaint is sustained with leave to amend.

(see word minutes for complete details)

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling.

Judge: Christine Van Aken; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/CVA)

Judge: Christine Van Aken. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not Reported. (301/CVA)
